fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Identifies a combination of dimension values.
The field is automatically populated after you select dimension values.

Additional Information

The value of the field is calculated based on the dimension values that you select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.
The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Dimension Value ID
fields.tooltip:
Identifies a unique dimension value.

Additional Information

The field is automatically incremented, and the value is managed internally.

fields.name: Dimension Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive name of the Dimension Code field.

fields.name: Dimension Value Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the descriptive name of the Dimension Value Code field.
